title: Ofcom annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
text:
Ofcom is the communications regulator in the UK. Ofcom regulate the TV, radio and video-on-demand sectors, fixed-line telecoms (phones), mobiles and postal services, plus the airwaves over which wireless devices operate.

This annual report was laid in Parliament on 10 July 2025.

Ofcom annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
